falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 closes above 5,200 (a 10% increase from the current level) within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A clear bullish breakout invalidates the 'HOLD' signal by confirming a strong upward trend contrary to the pattern's implied consolidation

falsification_conditions.condition: The 14-day average trading volume on the Nasdaq exceeds 200% of the 30-day average volume
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Sustained extreme volatility would falsify the 'UNKNOWN' verdict by confirming a breakout scenario rather than a continuation of the current pattern

falsification_conditions.condition: The CBOE VIX index drops below 12 (a 30% decrease from current levels) within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A sharp decline in volatility would contradict the 'HOLD' signal by indicating market complacency and potential trend exhaustion

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
